title: Build replay harness: replay captured inputs under alternate configs; emit counterfactual trade set + attribution summary
objective: Produce a faithful offline replay harness that re-runs captured decision loops under an alternate config and emits counterfactual trades with full attribution.
paper_only_note: Offline replay only. No live code modified.
forbidden_actions: Build the sweep CLI (that is REPLAY_SWEEP_CLI_001)
required_work: 1. Check for prior HANDOFF_REPLAY_HARNESS_001 work and reuse if present.
2. Define ReplayConfig, ReplayResult, ReplayedTrade dataclasses mirroring attribution schema.
3. Implement harness: per-capture replay, config-driven trade/skip, walk-the-book fill, TP/SL/resolution exit simulation across subsequent captures.
4. Aggregate trade set into summary (hit rate, Brier, log-loss, edge realization, pnl by trade_class).
5. Include fidelity-check mode: replay one past day with its live config and report PnL divergence vs real trades.
acceptance_criteria: Harness runs on a date range and returns a ReplayResult
Fidelity check shows < 5% PnL divergence from real trades on a historical config
All trade_class enum values representable in replay output
Zero changes to live code paths
verification: Run replay against a recent date with live config; paste summary output
Describe how TP/SL exits are simulated from subsequent captures
